name: Twenty One
short_description: You wake up in a velvet-draped casino that seems suspended in a void, run by faceless dealers and watched by an unseen Host. You're told you owe a "debt of existence" and must earn your right to live another day by beating the Quota. You have 5 rounds to meet the quota, or… you're out. Permanently.
detailed_description:
You wake up in a velvet-draped casino that seems suspended in a void, run by faceless dealers and watched by an unseen Host. You're told you owe a "debt of existence" and must earn your right to live another day by beating the Quota — a cash target that rises with each round. You have 5 rounds to meet or exceed the quota, or… you're out. Permanently.

💵 Core Gameplay:

  • You start with $50.

  • You must reach a quota of $150 in 5 rounds. The quota increases after each successful completion.

  • Each round, you are matched with an NPC to play "21", a dark variant of Blackjack.

♠️ Trump Cards:

Every player gets access to Trump Cards — single-use twists that bend or break the rules of 21. Trump Cards can be bought, earned through riskier plays, or awarded after surviving intense matches.

🕒 The Clock Is Ticking:

Each round has a real-time limit, forcing you to make decisions under pressure. As the game progresses:

  • The time shortens.

  • Opponents grow more unpredictable or monstrous.

  • Visuals distort — cards bleed, tables stretch, opponents twitch unnaturally.

Fail to meet the quota in time? You’re pulled into “The Pit”, a final death-match round where the odds are heavily stacked, but survival might buy you another cycle.

supported_languages:
English*, French, Spanish - Latin America, Czech
*languages with full audio support
